name: X-Golf Bismarck
about: X-Golf Bismarck offers indoor golf simulator experiences combined with a full-service sports bar and event space. The venue features 8 state-of-the-art simulators that can accommodate up to 6 people per bay, providing an environment for both serious practice and casual play. Pricing is structured per bay, per hour, with rates varying by day and time, and includes the flexibility for groups to share the cost. The facility is designed as an all-in-one destination for golf, entertainment, and social gatherings, with a focus on accessibility for various skill levels and group sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: Accurate and realistic golf simulation technology combining camera systems, lasers, and impact sensors
Flexible, group-friendly pricing model where one hourly rate covers up to 6 players
Full-service bar and sports atmosphere making it ideal for both focused play and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a variety of tasty bites and food menu accessible online
Full service bar offering a complete range of alcoholic beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available at the venue. The simulators also have an automatic tee system built-in.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has a full kitchen and bar available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. With more players, plan for one hour per person added.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and the environment is accommodating for family groups.
